ListItem.Para: Alternate procedures are established and used.
Regular passengers may not be carried, however remaining crew or engineers that require repositioning due to the unserviceability may travel.

Any persons carried on the flight must be seated in the forward three rows. They are to be briefed that the emergency lights are inoperative. Advise location of flashlights at cabin crew stations and that they may be utilised as required.
Inoperative seat-mounted lights are not adjacent to each other.
Seat-mounted lights adjacent to each passenger entry door operate normally.

MELSubItem.Title: Main-Aisle Monument Mounted Proximity Lights (Applicable to VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One main-aisle light may be inoperative per aisle side on a monument where two adjacent main-aisle lights per aisle side are installed.

MELSubItem.Title: Main-Aisle Monument Mounted Proximity Lights (Applicable to VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One main-aisle light may be inoperative per aisle side on a monument where two adjacent main-aisle lights per aisle side are installed.

MELSubItem.Title: Main-Aisle Monument Mounted Proximity Lights (Applicable to VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One main-aisle light may be inoperative per aisle side on a monument where two adjacent main-aisle lights per aisle side are installed.

MELSubItem.Title: Cross-Aisle Monument-mounted Proximity Lights (Applicable to VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868 VN-A869, VN-A870, VN-A871)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One cross-aisle light may be inoperative on a monument where two cross-aisle lights are installed provided light is not adjacent to attendant seat.

MELSubItem.Title: Cross-Aisle Monument-mounted Proximity Lights (Applicable to VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One cross-aisle light may be inoperative on a monument where two cross-aisle lights are installed provided light is not adjacent to attendant seat.
Aft exit identifier (back-light and/or flood-light) at each door may be inoperative.
One exit identifier flood-light at each door may be inoperative.
Forward exit identifier (back-light and/or flood-light) at each door may be inoperative.
